3. How often do people use knapsacks in libraries?

zysteon_system

The frequency with which people use knapsacks in libraries can vary widely depending on the context. Knapsacks are more commonly used for carrying items outside the library, such as books one intends to check out or bring home, rather than storing items within the library itself. Therefore, it is less common to see people using knapsacks inside a library compared to other settings like bookstores or during outdoor activities.
